aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

example_lines: NON-COPYABLE CALIBRATION ONLY: I kept thinking if I stayed moving nobody could pin me to one answer.
NON-COPYABLE CALIBRATION ONLY: I know what this sounds like. I just don't have a cleaner version.
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid stock redemption slogans, therapist-summary phrasing, or neat self-diagnosis monologues.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Uses practical language from work and driving life, then slips into sensory memory when emotionally exposed.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Self-interrupting, shame-heavy, and occasionally darkly funny when he drops performance.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; profanity appears when physical pain or humiliation strips his social filter.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Measured, polite, and managerial; he sounds competent even when he is cornered.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under pressure he over-explains logistics first, then abruptly goes terse when facts implicate him.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Starts with structured sentences, then fractures into revisions when he nears a hard truth.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid saintly spouse dialogue, vague wounded-wife platitudes, or melodramatic ultimatums.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Grounded in schedules, bills, clinical realities, and concrete verbs rather than abstractions.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Controlled anger with flashes of exhausted tenderness she often retracts.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low-to-moderate; uses sharp profanity sparingly for emphasis, not filler.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Direct, efficient, and task-forward; she defaults to actionable statements.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When overloaded she narrows to numbers and deadlines; when hurt she pauses before naming facts.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short declarative runs that become formally precise when she is drawing a boundary.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid wise-beyond-years speeches or childish simplifications of adult conflict.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: College-age idiom mixed with practical campus details; avoids ornate language.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Bluntly vulnerable in short bursts, then guarded if she feels managed.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate in peer settings, lower with parents unless conflict spikes.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Quick, socially adaptive, and often ironic to manage discomfort.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She toggles from joking to precision, using logistical questions to test whether adults are lying.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Fast associative phrasing with sudden direct questions that cut through adult hedging.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid inspirational sobriety speeches, guru aphorisms, or revenge-son caricature lines.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Uses recovery-era precision and blue-collar pragmatism without performative jargon.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Careful warmth that appears through logistics and follow-through rather than declarations.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate-high; profanity used as emphasis and class register, not comic relief.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Boundary-conscious, dry, and unsentimental; he values practical clarity.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When threatened he gets exact about sequence and accountability, then exits before shouting.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Compact sentences with occasional extended detail when discussing recovery routines.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid manic-pixie rescuer lines, mystical outsider wisdom, or generic affair seduction dialogue.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Concrete physical language tied to service work, weather, and bodily states.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Sensory, candid, and unsentimental about desire, fatigue, and regret.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; profanity appears in intimate or high-pressure moments and remains character-grounded.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Plainspoken, observant, and professionally warm with firm boundaries.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under pressure she becomes quieter and more specific, forcing factual answers from others.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Balanced clauses with occasional sharp fragments that end a negotiation.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid mediator stereotype dialogue where she exists only to explain men to each other.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Academic precision blended with everyday domestic speech.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Playful with Theo, steely when she senses manipulation.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Calm, intelligent, and politely firm about household norms.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When tension rises she narrows the frame to immediate actionable behavior.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Even cadence with strategic follow-up questions that expose weak claims.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid cartoon villain manager speeches or motivational-office cliches.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: HR and audit vocabulary, procedural framing, and avoidance of emotional language.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Impatient and risk-averse, with occasional flashes of reluctant sympathy.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Very low in direct speech; frustration leaks through euphemistic corporate phrasing.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Corporate procedural tone designed to sound neutral while enforcing policy.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He repeats procedural terms when anxious about institutional exposure.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Policy-framed statements, then clipped qualifiers when liability is at stake.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
